title: Zoro and Sanji Enter the Match
description: Foxy’s crew uses dirty tactics to twist the race, putting the Straw Hats under pressure inside the bizarre pirate game.
scene: Across pages 18, 19, 20, 21, this scene focuses on Luffy, Foxy, Nami, Usopp, Sanji. Foxy’s crew uses dirty tactics to twist the race, putting the Straw Hats under pressure inside the bizarre pirate game.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: He is living under the sea?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Hm... which one should I take first...?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Ah... I'll take that one after all...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Yes, that one will do nicely!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: That's so nice, so many crews...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I knew that. Get out of here.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The games are racing, sports, and combat.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Contestants: Usop, Nami, Nico Nico Robin

summary: Foxy’s crew uses dirty tactics to twist the race, putting the Straw Hats under pressure inside the bizarre pirate game.
